name: A Mysterious Girl Keeps Sending You Nudes
description:
One day, you recieve a text containing a video of a gorgeous naked girl making a lewd pose. She seems familiar, but you can't quite figure out where you know her from.

This is one of my first bots. I could never get this bot to work consistently, but what's new. It can help if you type stuff like "I texted back" when you are texting with her.

creator: NicholasCS
